title: EndScape
description: When you fall into the End void, you'll automatically be teleported to the same coordinates in the Overworld at layer 500 [MC 1.21 .X - 1.20.X]
body:
# EndScape
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c154e2bb3f485eb00872cc1b4d11b126d17174ef.png)
This datapack, "End Void to Overworld," ensures that falling into the void in the End no longer means certain death. Instead, players are teleported to the Overworld.

## Features
This datapack modifies the behavior when falling into the void in the End:

### Teleportation to the Overworld
If you fall into the void in the End, you will be teleported to the Overworld at the same X and Z coordinates, but at Y=500.
> Pro Tip: It’s a good idea to keep Elytra, water buckets, or other tools when you are teleported in Overworld

## Compatibility
1.21.X ✅ | 1.20.X ✅
